raw.objective: “to estimate the population pharmacokinetic parameters (apparent clearance [CL/F] and apparent volume of distribution [V/F]) for lamotrigine in a group of adult patients receiving the drug. We aimed to determine intersubject and intrasubject pharmacokinetic variability, and to investigate the influence of covariates on the pharmacokinetic parameters.”
raw.covariates: Tested: Age, gender, concomitant antiepileptic medications, and clinical site on CL and V Included: VPA and PHT on CL, although no values provided
raw.observations: The paper only states that the values of change in CL due to VPA/PHT comedication are in line with literature values, but are then not provided.
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*(1+theta2*PHT)*(1+theta3*VPA)*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta4*(1+eta2) Ka=theta5 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) PHT/VPA: comedication with phenytoin/valproate (no=0, yes=1)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=2.14 theta2=Not given theta3=Not given theta4=78.1 theta5=Not given omega1=0.14 omega2=0.0043 sigma1=Not given

extraction_target.title: Population pharmacokinetics of lamotrigine.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*(1+theta2*PHT)*(1+theta3*VPA)*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta4*(1+eta2) Ka=theta5 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) PHT/VPA: comedication with phenytoin/valproate (no=0, yes=1)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to estimate the population pharmacokinetic parameters (apparent clearance [CL/F] and apparent volume of distribution [V/F]) for lamotrigine in a group of adult patients receiving the drug. We aimed to determine intersubject and intrasubject pharmacokinetic variability, and to investigate the influence of covariates on the pharmacokinetic parameters.”

tested: and clinical site on CL and V
covariates.raw: Tested: Age, gender, concomitant antiepileptic medications, and clinical site on CL and V Included: VPA and PHT on CL, although no values provided

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
